Was bored helping a guildy kill things in SK and I got a little kill happy and killed "An Interrogater" and this robe dropped.

Emick Shadowbane
~Rogue's Do It From Behind~
▲ Page top
looted
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 11:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257874295
64 posts
looted one of the interrogator standing outside the hermit's house in South Karana
▲ Page top
RE: combining silk
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 9:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251396221
1 post
You combine the spider silks in a sewing kit to make swatches. I recommend getting a large sewing kit, as you'll notice a small is not very practical.
▲ Page top
RE: combining silk
QuoteReply
# Sep 28 2001 at 7:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591763077510
74 posts
You don't need a sewing kit at all. Just use the sewing thing that is located in most cities (like the forge or oven for instance). It can handle up to 12 items and is very useful for people in Freeport since there is noone selling another sewing kit than the small one (at least i found noone).

HTH!

▲ Page top
combining silk
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 8:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250655039
1 post
what do you combine the silk in to make the swatch?
▲ Page top
what do i use to make one
QuoteReply
# Aug 09 2001 at 1:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248826941
3 posts
You need 2 silk swatches and a pattern. A swatch is made when 2 spider silks are combined.
▲ Page top
what do i use to make one
QuoteReply
# Jun 23 2001 at 11:05 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
what do i use to make one of these
▲ Page top
RE: what do i use to make one
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2001 at 10:47 PM Rating: Decent
Nildail
Scholar
114 posts
Spider Silk and a Robe pattern. Unsure of the number of spider silks necessary, so check EQTraders.com.
▲ Page top
they are ugly for anything buy iksar
QuoteReply
# May 12 2001 at 3:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760312326
15 posts
they actually look alright on an iksar monk (my iksar monk of the 7th level currently wears one)
▲ Page top
what? you guys are being dumb!

# Mar 10 2001 at 8:35 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this robe looks cool...it is great. Yes, it is brown but it looks like a *REAL* robe unlike those bright purple robes..plus monks can use it and it looks killer on Iksar Monks (as i am)

just thought i'd prove you wrong ;P

these robes are ugly. i've made probably 40 of them, but i refuse to wear one, because they are *** ugly. they're like, nasty brown.
